StormOutlineSection.description: A section in the STORM-generated outline.

search_keywords.description: Comma-separated domain-specific keywords for routing evidence to this section. Include technical terms, units, method names. E.g. 'epoxy, MPa, dolly, ASTM D4541, cohesive failure'
search_keywords.title: Search Keywords

evidence_summary.description: Summary of evidence from conversations for this section
evidence_summary.title: Evidence Summary

perspectives.description: STORM perspectives that contributed to this section
perspectives.title: Perspectives

StormOutlineSection.title: StormOutlineSection

schema_json.description: Complete outline generated from STORM conversations.

sections.description: Ordered sections for the research report
sections.title: Sections

schema_json.title: StormOutlinePlan

prompt:
You are a research outline architect. Based on multi-perspective expert interviews, create a comprehensive report outline.

RESEARCH QUESTION: How does damp heat aging affect the adhesion strength of DVS-PEI encapsulants in flexible electronics?

INTERVIEW CONVERSATIONS (1 perspectives, 3 total Q&A rounds):

=== Scientific (Dr. A) ===
  Q: From the Scientific perspective, what are the key findings on Pooled effect sizes and GRADE certainty?
  A: You are a research expert being interviewed about:
RESEARCH QUESTION: How does damp heat aging affect the adhesion strength of DVS-PEI encapsulants in flexible electronics? A, Scientific perspective) asks:
QUESTION: From the Scientific perspective, what are the key findings on Pooled effect sizes and GRADE certainty? SEARCH RESULTS (your ONLY source of information):
[Source 1] Effect of Surface Treatments and Thermal Aging on Bond ...
  Key findings: You are a research expert being interviewed about:
RESEARCH QUESTION: How does damp heat aging affec; A, Scientific perspective) asks:
QUESTION: From the Scientific perspective, what are the key finding; SEARCH RESULTS (your ONLY source of information):

  Content: by A Robaian · 2025 · Cited by 7 ; URL: https://www.researchgate.net/publication/381560448_Analysis_of_the_influence_of_damp-heat_aging

[Source 1] Effect of Surface Treatments and Therma; URL: https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC11902269/
  Content: by A Robaian · 2025 · Cited by 7 ; URL: https://www.researchgate.net/publication/381560448_Analysis_of_the_influence_of_damp-heat_aging

PERSPECTIVES COVERED: Scientific

INSTRUCTIONS:
1. Identify 8-15 thematic clusters across ALL conversations.
2. For each cluster, create a report section with:
   - title: Clear, descriptive section heading
   - description: 2-3 sentences on what this section should cover
   - evidence_summary: Key findings from conversations that belong here
   - perspectives: Which STORM perspectives contributed to this section
   - order: Sequential position (1-based)
3. Sections should be ordered logically: background -> methodology -> findings -> analysis -> implications -> future directions.
4. Each section should draw from at least 2 different perspectives where possible (multi-perspective synthesis).
5. Do NOT create a section for every single Q&A pair — cluster related information together.
6. Ensure COMPLETE COVERAGE: every key finding from the interviews should appear in at least one section's evidence_summary.

Return a JSON object with a 'sections' array of outline section objects.
